reasoning: At 4x the orange pot/cauldron shape reads clearly with good contrast on dark backgrounds — the orange body against the dark rim and bright green interior creates a legible read. Edge pixels are clean at 4x. However, at 1x the sprite collapses into an unreadable blob with no distinct silhouette character. Charm is the bigger miss: the hexagonal segmented orange body reads industrial/mechanical rather than round-soft-toylike. No friendly personality elements (no face, no whimsy, no sticker appeal). The grey base shadow blends into the light background reducing contrast there. Passes the technical pixel-art craft bar at 4x but fails the 'sticker test' and the cute/charm criterion that this rubric requires.
